content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "在咖啡店點飲料",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問想要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn xiǎng yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 xiang3 yao4 he1 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我想要一杯小杯的拿鐵，少冰，半糖。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yào yī bēi xiǎo bēi de nátiě, shǎo bīng, bàn táng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 bei1 xiao3 bei1 de na2tie3, shao3 bing1, ban4 tang2.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like a small latte, less ice, half sugar.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 작은 라떼 한 잔에 얼음 적게, 반 당으로 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，小杯拿鐵少冰半糖，這樣是八十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xiǎo bēi nátiě shǎo bīng bàn táng, zhèyàng shì bāshí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, xiao3 bei1 na2tie3 shao3 bing1 ban4 tang2, zhe4yang4 shi4 ba1shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, a small latte with less ice and half sugar, that's 80 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 작은 라떼에 얼음 적게, 반 당으로 80원입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，麻煩幫我外帶，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, máfan bāng wǒ wàidài, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, ma2fan bang1 wo3 wai4dai4, xie4xie.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, please make it for takeout, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 포장해 주세요, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題，請等一下。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, qǐng děng yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, qing3 deng3 yi1xia4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, please wait a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다, 잠시만 기다려 주세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Small latte with less ice and half sugar", "Medium latte with no ice and normal sugar", "Large latte with extra ice and full sugar"],
          "options_ko": ["작은 라떼에 얼음 적게, 반 당", "중간 라떼에 얼음 없이, 일반 당", "큰 라떼에 얼음 많이, 일반 당"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are the customer. Order a drink with your preferences (size, ice, sugar)."
    },
    {
      "title": "確認價錢",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，請問這個紅茶多少錢？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐng wèn zhège hóngchá duōshao qián?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4si, qing3 wen4 zhe4ge hong2cha2 duo1shao qian2?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, how much is this black tea?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 이 홍차는 얼마입니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "這個紅茶一杯是三十五塊。",
          "pinyin": "Zhège hóngchá yī bēi shì sānshíwǔ kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4ge hong2cha2 yi1 bei1 shi4 san1shi2wu3 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "This black tea is 35 dollars per cup.",
          "translation_ko": "이 홍차는 한 잔에 35원입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "那大杯的價錢呢？",
          "pinyin": "Nà dà bēi de jiàqián ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 da4 bei1 de jia4qian2 ne?",
          "translation_en": "And what about the price for a large cup?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 큰 컵 가격은요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "大杯的是四十五塊。",
          "pinyin": "Dà bēi de shì sìshíwǔ kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Da4 bei1 de shi4 si4shi2wu3 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "The large cup is 45 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "큰 컵은 45원입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，我要一杯大杯的紅茶，少冰，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ yào yī bēi dà bēi de hóngchá, shǎo bīng, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 yao4 yi1 bei1 da4 bei1 de hong2cha2, shao3 bing1, xie4xie.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll have a large black tea with less ice, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 큰 홍차 한 잔에 얼음 적게 주세요, 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How much is a large black tea?",
          "question_ko": "큰 홍차는 얼마입니까?",
          "options_en": ["35 dollars", "45 dollars", "80 dollars"],
          "options_ko": ["35원", "45원", "80원"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are the customer. Ask about the price of a drink and then order it."
    },
    {
      "title": "請再說一次",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 yao4 he1 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，可以再說一次嗎？請慢一點。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, kěyǐ zài shuō yī cì ma? Qǐng màn yīdiǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4si, ke3yi3 zai4 shuo1 yi1 ci4 ma? Qing3 man4 yi1dian3.",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, could you say that again? Please speak slower.",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 한 번 더 말씀해 주시겠습니까? 천천히 해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請問——要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng wèn——yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 wen4——yao4 he1 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 무엇을 드시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我想要一杯中杯的豆漿，去冰，正常甜。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng yào yī bēi zhōng bēi de dòujiāng, qù bīng, zhèngcháng tián.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 bei1 zhong1 bei1 de dou4jiang1, qu4 bing1, zheng4chang2 tian2.",
          "translation_en": "I'd like a medium soy milk, no ice, normal sweetness.",
          "translation_ko": "중간 두유 한 잔에 얼음 없이, 일반 당으로 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題，中杯豆漿去冰正常甜，這樣是四十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, zhōng bēi dòujiāng qù bīng zhèngcháng tián, zhèyàng shì sìshí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, zhong1 bei1 dou4jiang1 qu4 bing1 zheng4chang2 tian2, zhe4yang4 shi4 si4shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, medium soy milk no ice normal sweetness, that's 40 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다, 중간 두유 얼음 없이 일반 당으로 40원입니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Medium soy milk with no ice and normal sugar", "Small soy milk with less ice and half sugar", "Large soy milk with ice and full sugar"],
          "options_ko": ["중간 두유 얼음 없이 일반 당", "작은 두유 얼음 적게 반 당", "큰 두유 얼음 많이 일반 당"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are the customer. Ask the staff to repeat something slowly, then order a drink."
    }
  ]
}
